message:
feat(abi): add nocancel wrappers, complex math, malloc stats flat-combining, and glibc internal stubs

Session 17 (RusticWolf): implement missing glibc internal aliases including
nocancel syscall wrappers (__close_nocancel, __open_nocancel, __read_nocancel,
__write_nocancel, __pread64_nocancel), internal VM aliases (__mmap, __mprotect,
__munmap, __madvise), C99 <complex.h> full coverage (cabs through ctanh for
double/float/long-double variants), malloc_stats/mallinfo2 backed by lock-free
flat-combining publication slots, resolver context internals, IDNA/DNS name
handling stubs, and NPTL/gconv/misc internal symbols. Updates version script
(libc.map), support matrix (2776->2910 exports), and malloc ABI tests with
thread-safety guards and concurrent stress test for balanced alloc/free.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-  "total_exported": 2776,
+  "total_exported": 2910,
   "taxonomy": {
     "Implemented": "Native Rust code owns the entire operation. No host libc dependency. Full test coverage required.",
     "RawSyscall": "ABI entrypoint marshals arguments directly to Linux syscall instruction. No glibc call-through.",
